programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Monkey Up
programme.desc: The all-new family comedy about a talking capuchin monkey seeking to gain fame and fortune as a movie star, but instead finds what's most important, a family.

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Sea Level
programme.desc: Pup, a bamboo shark, discovers egg sacs while playing around the ocean with his friends. When he sees human poachers stealing the eggs from his reef, Pup makes it his mission to save his family.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: With Josh off to college, Buddy joins the local baseball squad with his little sister Andrea. Once again, Buddy is a natural at anything with a ball! He is having a great season when suddenly, his puppies start to disappear from their homes!

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Dough
programme.desc: Dough is a London-based comedic drama about the unlikely friendship between an old Jewish baker trying to save his family business and a young Muslim refugee from Darfur trying to help his mother by selling cannabis on the side.

programme.title: The Happytime Murders
programme.desc: An innovative film that incorporates influences from multiple genres to create a hilarious hybrid of film noir, crime drama, and cop buddy picture — with a healthy dose of R-Rated profanity and humor.

programme.title: Learning to Drive
programme.desc: Wendy is a book editor facing a marriage crisis. Darwan is a driving instructor from India with an abiding respect for tradition. When Wendy sets out to reclaim her independence, she hits a unique roadblock - she never learned to drive.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Prevenge
programme.desc: A pitch black, wryly British comedy from the mind of Alice Lowe, Prevenge follows Ruth, a pregnant woman on a killing spree. It's her misanthropic unborn baby dictating Ruth's actions, holding society responsible for the absence of a father. Struggling with her strain of prepartum madness, Ruth must ultimately choose between redemption and destruction at the moment of motherhood.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: From the twisted minds behind Saw IV, V and Saw VI, The Collector is a real-time game of cat-and-mouse, melding primal horror with a cracking suspense thriller. An ex-con, Arkin (Josh Stewart) is trying to get his life back on track, and out of desperation decides to rob his new employer's country home, unaware that a second criminal has also targeted the property, and rigged it with a series of deadly traps. As the seconds tick down to midnight, Arkin becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention, while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: Adventures of a Private Eye
programme.desc: With renowned private eye Judd Blake away on business, his lacklustre assistant Bob jumps at the chance to prove himself as an equally skilled detective. When a former model is blackmailed by a set of compromising photographs, the well meaning, but inexperienced Bob takes on the case. With a list of eccentric suspects all set to inherit a fortune if the offending pictures should come to light, the naive detective sets about uncovering the blackmailer, but his investigation is continuously hampered by sexy shenanigans. Bob soon finds himself in over his head as he tries to protect his client and solve the mystery.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn (Akasha Villalobos), the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. Wracked with guilt and paranoia, Camryn leads a depressingly lonely existence until Nick (Brian Villalobos), a new co-worker, befriends Camryn and attempts to integrate her into his group of friends. Just when she might be ready to start a new life, Camryn's past comes back to haunt her. Can Camryn ever have a life again, or is she destined to be alone?

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: The first humans on Mars do what they must to survive the cosmic elements and each other. Starring Jonny Lee Miller (2021)

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: Ethan Hawk stars as a Temporal Agent preventing crimes before they happen. His last assignment is to stop the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time and prevent an attack that may cost thous

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: When the pilot of a passenger plane is killed by a rogue solar flare, one of the passengers has to step up and try to land the plane.

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: A family must try to survive when a massive polar vortex covers most of the planet in ice. Starring Tom Sizemore and Emily Killian (2020)

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Breakout
programme.desc: An innocent camping trip takes a dark turn for a young brother and sister, when they witness a murder. The young siblings become the killers' next target as they are chased and hunted through the wilderness.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.

programme.title: Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, playfully clashing over everything from ingredients to tastes, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief (Morgan Freeman) recruits a younger crook (Antonio Banderas) to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: From Emmy award winning director Stephen Hopkins and the producers of Fight Club, we follow a wealthy attorney who is accused of the murder of a young girl. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Gene Hackman, Thomas Jane

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn
programme.desc: The Quileutes close in on Edward and Bella, whose unborn child poses a threat to the Wolf Pack and Forks.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn
programme.desc: The Cullens gather together other vampire clans in order to protect Renesmee from a false allegation.

programme.title: The Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The standard tropes and clichés of horror films are obliterated in this clever, fun, and whimsical film.

programme.title: The Changeover
programme.desc: Laura is drawn into a supernatural battle with an ancient spirit who threatens her family.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A gritty and riveting crime thriller following two LAPD officers as they hunt two cop killers on the loose in a city about to boil over. Training Day meets End of Watch, this is a brutal look at the extreme danger and unthinkable sacrifices police officers face when they commit to serve and protect the public. Starring Thomas Jane (The Mist) and Luke Kleintank (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: June
programme.desc: Dark. Demonic. Disturbing. Nine-year-old orphan June has been found a new adoptive family. What her new parents do not know is that June is possessed by an ancient dark spirit named Aer. As the evil Aer plans to destroy everything, will June be able to save her new family and herself? In the vein of The Omen and Orphan, this chilling supernatural cult horror is a genre classic and one not to miss.

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: A small town falls prey to mother nature as big business rolls in and disturbs a killer pathogen thats laid dormant beneath the ground for centuries. As the drilling starts the health of the community starts to fail and the land begins to rot and unbeknownst to the town, the infected land is also killing them one by one. Prepare to unearth all out edge of your seat terror, as nature wages war.

programme.title: The Dark
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. Hailed by critics as the best horror film in recent memory, The Dark is a haunting and deeply intense atmospheric film about love, monsters and revenge that is being compared to the spine-chilling Let The Right One In. Mina stalks the forest that saw her murder. Anyone who enters, become her feast. But when she meets a young boy, she becomes his protector.

programme.title: Aloha With Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a personal assistant plans her boss's wedding with the groom's handsome nephew.

programme.title: Flowers and Honey
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a city florist and a beekeeper on a ranch Sarah inherited from her Grandmother. Starring Ashley Newbrough (2021)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Alone Together
programme.desc: Two strangers wind up double-booked in the same New York rental at the start of quarantine. Exasperating the situation, these polar opposites must learn to cope with each other's eccentricities, realizing they have more in common than meets the eye.

programme.title: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: Forced to tolerate each other for a few days, two cynical wedding guests strike an unexpected alliance.

programme.title: Granada Nights
programme.desc: A British tourist is stuck in Granada, Spain with a broken heart. Feeling lost and abandoned, he befriends a group of young foreigners and crashes into the heart of the international student scene.

programme.title: Nights and Weekends
programme.desc: In her directorial debut, Greta Gerwig stars as Mattie, a New York resident who over the course of a year desperately tries to navigate through the struggles of a long-distance relationship with her partner, James, who lives in Chicago.

programme.title: Love Notes
programme.desc: Starring Laura Leighton and Antonio Cupo. When a classical music critic becomes pregnant from a brief encounter with a country music star, she decides it is the perfect way for her infertile best friend to have a baby.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: Elsa And Fred
programme.desc: A withdrawn senior experiences life in new ways when he begins spending time with the free-spirited woman who lives across the hall. Starring: Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer, Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Lynn finds that marriage the second time around is far from idyllic when her husband's (Brian McNamara) ex-wife and children return to manipulate him.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: In the running for a promotion, reality cooking show producer Kelly prepares for her cooking show for kids. When show host Chef Betty has an unexpected injury, Kelly hires controversial Chef Stephen as a replacement.

programme.title: Dying To Be You
programme.desc: When Lily Anderson was in 4th grade, her class was given pen pals.

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: Ex-wife forms unique bond with ex-husband's new wife on road trip.

programme.title: Dying To Be You
programme.desc: When Lily Anderson was in 4th grade, her class was given pen pals.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Flowers & Honey
programme.desc: Florist Sarah inherits a ranch and must decide whether to sell it, or live the life of her dreams.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki and Henry hunt the sewers for a Windigo, an ancient native spirit.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: The Animal (2001)
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Just One Of The Guys
programme.desc: Aspiring entrepreneurs pitch their business ideas to moguls, known as the "Sharks," in hopes of landing investment funds in this U.S. adaptation of the British and Japanese reality hit Dragons' Den.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: Long Days of Vengeance
programme.desc: After three years of brutal labor for a crime he didn't commit, ex-Sheriff Ted Barnett escapes prison to hunt down the three men who framed him for his father's murder. "Long Days of Vengeance" is a gripping spaghetti western about justice, revenge, and redemption under the scorching desert sun.

programme.title: Don't Wait, Django... Shoot!
programme.desc: Django returns home to discover that his father has been killed by local bandits in a business deal gone wrong.

programme.title: $100,000 for a Killing
programme.desc: $100,000 for a Killing - Johnny Forest, bounty hunter, attempts to carry out his mother's dying wish that he bring in his outlaw brother, Clint, alive.

programme.title: Long Live ... Your Death!
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed Russian prince, a Mexican bandit and a radical Irish female journalist team up during the Mexican Revolution to find fortune and notoriety.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP25-28
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier and Vivien Leigh star as Lord Nelson and Lady Hamilton.

programme.title: This Sporting Life
programme.desc: Richard Harris gives a great performance as a man who wants to quit his job as a miner.

programme.title: The Arsenal Stadium Mystery
programme.desc: Classic crime drama. During a charity match between Arsenal and the Trojans, the Trojans' striker mysteriously collapses in full view of the capacity crowd. When it is discovered that he has been poisoned, Scotland Yard is called in to investigate.

programme.title: The Bad Lord Byron
programme.desc: Byron lies dying in Greece and reminisces on the loves and losses of his tempestuous life.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Automata
programme.desc: Fast forward fifty years into the future, planet earth is in the midst of gradual desertification. Mankind struggles to survive as the environment deteriorates and the slow regression of the human race begins in AUTÓMATA.

programme.title: The Congress
programme.desc: An aging, out-of-work actress accepts one last job, though the consequences of her decision affect her in ways she didn't consider.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: When a notorious bank robber is betrayed and left for dead by his crew, he survives only to take revenge. Starring Randy Couture (2022).

programme.title: The Air I Breathe
programme.desc: A businessman bets his life on a horse race a gangster sees the future a pop star falls prey to a crime boss a doctor must save the love of his life. Starring Brendan Fraser (2007)

programme.title: 10 Year Reunion
programme.desc: Four friends reunite for their high school reunion, reigniting the mystery behind their friend's death 10 years prior. Starring Kacey Clarke (2016)

programme.title: Living With The Enemy
programme.desc: In this thriller a woman begins to suspect her new husband was responsible for his previous wife's death. Is he keeping secrets? Sarah Lancaster stars. (2005)

programme.title: A Date With Murder
programme.desc: A lawyer investigates her sister's murder with little help from the police. Starring Alexandra Paul (2008)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin

programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Chill Factor
programme.desc: A new biological chemical weapon that explodes up to temperatures over fifty degrees Fahrenheit, falls into the hands of two men who try to make sure that it doesn't get stolen by a terrorist.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares.

programme.title: Red Corner
programme.desc: In this provocative thriller, an American (Richard Gere) on a business trip in China is framed for a brutal murder and soon finds himself at the mercy of a foreign court system he doesn't understand. Can he find the true killer before it's too late?

programme.title: The Fan
programme.desc: When the San Francisco Giants pay centerfielder Bobby Rayburn (Wesley Snipes) $40 million to lead their team to the World Series, no one is happier or more supportive than #1 fan Gil Renard (Robert De Niro).

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: Sniper 2
programme.desc: Tom Berenger (Training Day, The Big Chill) and Bokeem Woodbine (The Big Hit, The Rock) star with Dan Butler, Linden Ashby and Erika Marozsán in the action-packed sequel to one of the most intense andexplosive action thrillers of all time!

programme.title: Resident Evil: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Picking up after Resident Evil: Retribution, Alice (Milla Jovovich) is the only survivor of what was meant to be humanity's final stand against the Undead.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure. When they take some friends (Scott Caan, Ashley Scott) on an extreme sport adventure, the last thing they expect to see below the water is a legendary pirate ship rumored to contain millions in gold.

programme.title: Sniper: Ghost Shooter
programme.desc: Elite snipers Brandon Beckett and Richard Miller (Billy Zane) are fighting extremists in the Middle East when Colonel gives them a new mission: to protect a gas pipeline stretching from the Republic of Georgia to Western Europe from terrorists eager to make a political statement.

programme.title: S3 E16 Glasgow to the Borders
programme.desc: The suburbs of Glasgow have been home to Malcolm for 30 years. Now he wants to escape to Sir Walter Scott country–the Scottish Borders. Melissa Porter turns up a few surprises in her search for a traditional cottage for Malcolm and his partner Cath.

programme.title: S3 E18 Derby to Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Lawyer Mandi wants to give up her daily commute and open a cattery. She also needs enough land for two show horses–a husband and a son who love tractors! Catherine Gee goes shopping for the home that's going to change the family's life.

programme.title: S14 E1 Herefordshire (Smyth)
programme.desc: Couple seeks 3-bedroom house in Herefordshire for £700,000 to start a business.

programme.desc: Newly-weds seek period property in Cumbria for £700,000.

programme.title: S14 E5 Cornwall
programme.desc: Couple plans to start a B&B in Cornwall with £650,000.

programme.title: S14 E7 Somerset
